name: The Front End Developer
effect: Render the interface as specified, on the devices that were tested. This card is considered complete.

clauses.name: BROWSER COMPATIBILITY CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If a stakeholder opens the product in an untested browser: The layout is considered a known limitation.

clauses.name: DESIGN DRIFT EFFECT
clauses.rule: Each time the design file is updated without notice: This card absorbs the change silently.

clauses.name: SCOPE PROTECTION
clauses.rule: If the back end is not ready: This card waits indefinitely and is still considered blocked by someone else.

witness_quote: Can you just make it pop?

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Did anyone check this on mobile?
